DARV.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.0-0.an: Uh... you, what would you like to buy? I've got all the good stuff here.
DARV.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.0-1.ch: Cut! You're supposed to play Darv as a shrewd merchant! You can't be so timid and submissive!
DARV.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.0-2.an: Y-yes, Director! I'll adjust my performance right away!
DARV.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.1-0r.a: Oh, my fair lady, would you do me the honor of gracing my humble shop with your presence?
DARV.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.1-1r.c: Is Darv's character really this... gentlemanly?
DARV.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.2-0.an: Hey there! What a magnificent aura you have, miss! Come see my treasures, they're absolutely perfect for you!
DARV.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.2-1.ch: Hmm, that line was good. I'll keep this take!
NEOW.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.0-0.an: ...Accept... this... ..blessing.. ...the crew's... lunch boxes... have arrived......
NEOW.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.0-1.ch: Hey! The first half was so mysterious and imposing, how did the second half suddenly turn into a lunch menu!
NEOW.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.0-2.an: ...I'm sorry... Lady... Furina... but there's... your favorite... petit cake......
NEOW.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.0-3.ch: ...Ahem, in that case, let's wrap up this morning's shoot! Everyone take a break!
NEOW.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.1-0r.a: ...Lady... Furina... did... it hurt... when you... fell... just now......
NEOW.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.1-1r.c: Cut! You're playing Neow right now! Why would an ancient whale care if the leading lady is hurt? That's not what the script says!
NEOW.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.1-2r.a: ...I'm so... sorry... Director... let's... start... over......
NEOW.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.2-0.an: ...Go forth...... ...Kill... the... Architect... ...Ow... the wire... is... stuck......
NEOW.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.2-1.ch: I knew it! Where's the stage crew? Get me and this big whale down! I'm dangling in mid-air and can barely keep my cool persona!
NEOW.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.2-2.an: ...Poor... Lady... Furina... hanging... here... with me......
NEOW.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.2-3.ch: Don't use that deep dramatic tone! It sounds even creepier!
NONUPEIPE.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.0: You've come a long way to reach me! Come closer... Ouch!
Cut! Watch the steps! Your wig is completely covering your eyes, you're stumbling all over the place!
But even though I can't see anything, I can still feel your radiant brilliance!
Ahem, enough with the flattery! Makeup artist, come pin her bangs back with a clip!
NONUPEIPE.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.1: Madness awaits at the top of the tower. Wear my power and destroy... phew, this jewelry is so heavy...
Stop! How did you turn this haughty line into something that sounds like weightlifting! All the gravitas is gone!
I'm really sorry, Director, this solid copper necklace is just too heavy...
Ugh, why did the props team use real materials! Switch it to wood and paint it gold!
NONUPEIPE.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.2: Royal guests deserve royal blessings. Servants! Bring us some tea.
Please have some tea, Lady Furina! We specially lined up to buy this limited-edition raspberry mousse!
Cut! You're the giant's servants, not my fan club! Also, you're completely blocking the camera!
Yeah, exactly! Stop stealing the spotlight, step back, you're even stepping on my fish tail!
More stories! Found these things for you! So hurry and tell more stories!!
Cut! Why is your big eye staring at me like that? The line asks for stories, not to swallow the leading lady whole!
Sorry, Lady Furina! This one-eyed costume is too hot...
Hey! You're too close! Props team, stuff some ice packs into that big head of his to cool him down!
OROBAS.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.1-0r: No violence! Take something shiny... SHINY!!
OROBAS.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.1-1r: Stop, stop, stop! Your limbs and tentacles are all tangled up! How are you supposed to hand me the shiny prop?
OROBAS.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.1-2r: Waaah, Lady Furina, these dozen legs are so hard to control. Whenever I get excited, they tie themselves in knots.
OROBAS.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.1-3r: What am I going to do with you! Stage crew, come help untangle him! This is a key scene, don't drop the props!
The Architect isn't bad! Maybe chat? Chatting is good!! Very good!
Cut! Your voice is way too affected! You need to show innocent childlike wonder, not act like you're whining for attention!
Again, use a more ethereal voice!
PAEL.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.0-0.an: Welcome back, friend. Let my flesh help you...
PAEL.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.0-1.ch: Cut! What are you handing me? This isn't the crew's slime gel prop, is it? Why does it smell like fruit?
PAEL.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.0-2.an: Lady Furina, that meat chunk looked too gross, so I was worried it'd be uncomfortable for you to hold. I paid out of pocket and swapped it for fruit gummies!
PAEL.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.0-3.ch: Nonsense! The gummies do suit my taste, but it's completely exposed on camera! Switch it back to the prop!
PAEL.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.1-0r.a: When you return again, I too shall be renewed. Such is the power of sleep... zzz...
PAEL.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.1-1r.c: Cut! Did you actually fall asleep?! And snoring! Even if the line mentions sleeping, you can't actually sleep!
PAEL.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.2-0.an: Do you still remember the feeling of dreaming? Sleep is a good thing... Oh no, my horn fell off!
PAEL.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.2-1.ch: Stop! What's going on? Why is your wax costume actually melting?! Are the studio lights really that hot?
PAEL.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.2-2.an: Oh no! Makeup artist, hurry and use the ice-mist flower spray to cool him down, don't let the costume get ruined!
TANX.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.0-0.an: Hurry up and get stronger, let's have a proper fight!!!... Oops, the weapon snapped!
TANX.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.0-1.ch: Stop! All you had to do was hand me a weapon, how did you crush the sword handle! That's a borrowed prop!
TANX.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.0-2.an: Please calm down, Lady Furina! The claws on this costume are too clumsy, I couldn't control my strength when I got nervous...
TANX.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.0-3.ch: Stage crew! Get some glue! And be gentler with your movements, I don't want to get hit!
TANX.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.1-0r.a: Too weak! But you have great potential! Use this weapon!!
TANX.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.1-1r.c: Cut! Why are you yelling so loud! My ears are going deaf! You don't need to be so rough when handing over a prop!
TANX.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.1-2r.a: Sorry, Director! The costume is too soundproof, I was afraid you couldn't hear me!
TANX.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.1-3r.c: The presence is right, but cut the volume in half! Retake! And don't make me step back in surprise again!
TANX.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.2-0.an: You can never have too many weapons!! Actually, I think... the way you command the Salon Members is the strongest of all!!
TANX.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.2-1.ch: Cut! The second half isn't even in the script! You're a beast who only knows battle, don't suddenly turn into a flatterer!
TANX.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.2-2.an: Lady Furina, the script says you're too weak, but I just can't bring myself to say it! You're clearly the most dazzling star!
TANX.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.2-3.ch: Ahem! W-well, I am indeed radiant, but we must follow the setting in the scene! Show some professional integrity as an actor, retake!
TEZCATARA.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.0: Oh my, a visitor! Come in, darling! What can Tezcatara do for you?
Cut! The red glow on your face is too blinding! It's completely washing out my flawless lighting!
Sorry, Director! The lightbulb in the costume is too high-wattage! I'll turn it off right away!
Well, you don't need to turn it off completely, keep some mystery! Stage crew, put a translucent filter over it!
TEZCATARA.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.1: Welcome back, little darling. Let me burn away your flaws. ...Oops, the lighter is stuck!
Stop, stop, stop! You're a scarecrow, don't play with real fire on set! What if you set yourself or my dress on fire!
For you, I'd gladly turn to ashes!
Nobody wants you to turn to ashes! There's absolutely no need for that level of devotion!
TEZCATARA.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.2: Oh dear... you haven't been fighting this whole time, have you? Sit down, let me bring you some hot tea and give you a shoulder rub!
Cut! There's no shoulder-rubbing scene in the script! You're a witch, don't act like my personal maid!
But seeing you work so hard filming take after take, I just can't bear it! Let me use my straw hands to help you relax!
Ahem, I appreciate the thought. But we need to be professional on set!
VAKUU.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.0-0.a: For just a small price, you can have more of my power... or how about a petit cake?
VAKUU.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.0-1.c: Stop! Since when does a demon tempt people with petit cakes! Though I am a bit hungry... but don't go changing the script!
VAKUU.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.0-2.a: How about changing the price to me treating you to afternoon tea?
VAKUU.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.0-3.c: That won't do! This director has artistic standards! But I'll hold you to that afternoon tea offer after we wrap!
You know this will never end, right? ...Director, I've had over a dozen NGs, these wings are too heavy!
You have the nerve to complain? Who keeps forgetting lines and stepping on my dress? A big star's time is very precious!
VAKUU.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.2-0.a: Surrender yourself to me, and you can become as universally feared as I am... Achoo!
VAKUU.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.2-1.c: Cut! You're a demon who tempts hearts, how can you sneeze at the crucial moment! All the gravitas is gone!
VAKUU.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.2-2.a: Sorry, Director! Dust from the prop wings fell into my nose, I really didn't mean to!
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.FURINA_CHARACTER_FURI: ...Um, Director, should I really hit you?
Cut! You're the cold-hearted Architect, do you need permission before striking someone?
But the script says I have to ruthlessly knock you away...
I just can't bring myself to do it, Lady Furina!
This is acting! This star is on a wire harness, just swing your staff with force!
The rules of the Spire are written by me.
Stop! Stage crew, wasn't the whole room supposed to go dark when he waves his hand? Why is it stuck!
Director, the remote might be broken.
How about... I just make the sound effect with my mouth?
This is the climactic boss battle of the entire show! Making sound effects with your mouth is too cheap! Go fix it!
But within this tower, I am the only truth.
That's a wrap! Director, the script you wrote is absolutely brilliant!
Ahem, I see you understand this great director's profound vision.
Get ready to film my magnificent fall!
